underlying_goal: Execute a refinery patrol cycle: check hooked work, process mail, run merge queue checks, health checks, witness patrols, and hand off cleanly
friction_detail: The molecule's burn-and-respawn mechanism kept spawning new cycles, requiring multiple rounds of closing to fully clean up.
brief_summary: User instructed Claude to run a refinery patrol (check hooks, mail, merge queue, health), and Claude executed the full patrol cycle, handled respawning wisps, and handed off cleanly.
